en: Inasmuch as many have undertaken to compile a narrative of the things that have been accomplished among us,
zh: 尊敬的提阿非羅先生，因為有許多人，已經把在我們中間成就了的事，

en: just as those who from the beginning were eyewitnesses and ministers of the word have delivered them to us,
zh: 按照起初親眼看見的傳道人所傳給我們的，編著成書；

en: it seemed good to me also, having followed all things closely for some time past, to write an orderly account for you, most excellent Theophilus,
zh: 我已經把這些事從頭考查過，認為也應該按著次序寫給你，

en: that you may have certainty concerning the things you have been taught.
zh: 讓你曉得所學到的道理，都是確實的。

en: In the days of Herod, king of Judea, there was a priest named Zechariah, of the division of Abijah. And he had a wife from the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elizabeth.
zh: 猶太王希律在位的日子，亞比雅班裡有一個祭司，名叫撒迦利亞，他妻子是亞倫的後代，名叫以利沙伯。

en: And they were both righteous before God, walking blamelessly in all the commandments and statutes of the Lord.
zh: 他們在 神面前都是義人，遵行主的一切誡命規條，無可指摘，

en: But they had no child, because Elizabeth was barren, and both were advanced in years.
zh: 只是沒有孩子，因為以利沙伯不生育，二人又都上了年紀。

en: Now while he was serving as priest before God when his division was on duty,
zh: 有一次，撒迦利亞在 神面前按著班次執行祭司的職務，

en: according to the custom of the priesthood, he was chosen by lot to enter the temple of the Lord and burn incense.
zh: 照祭司的慣例抽中了籤，進入主的聖殿燒香。

en: And the whole multitude of the people were praying outside at the hour of incense.
zh: 燒香的時候，眾人都在外面祈禱。

en: And there appeared to him an angel of the Lord standing on the right side of the altar of incense.
zh: 有主的使者站在香壇右邊，向他顯現。

en: And Zechariah was troubled when he saw him, and fear fell upon him.
zh: 撒迦利亞一見就驚慌起來，十分害怕。

en: But the angel said to him, "Do not be afraid, Zechariah, for your prayer has been heard, and your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son, and you shall call his name John.
zh: 天使說：“撒迦利亞，不要怕，因為你的祈求已蒙垂聽，你妻子以利沙伯要給你生一個兒子，你要給他起名叫約翰。

en: And you will have joy and gladness, and many will rejoice at his birth,
zh: 你必歡喜快樂，許多人因他出生，也必喜樂。

en: for he will be great before the Lord. And he must not drink wine or strong drink, and he will be filled with the Holy Spirit, even from his mother's womb.
zh: 他在主面前要被尊為大，淡酒濃酒都不喝，未出母腹就被聖靈充滿。

en: And he will turn many of the children of Israel to the Lord their God,
zh: 他要使許多以色列人轉向主他們的 神。

en: and he will go before him in the spirit and power of Elijah, to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children, and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just, to make ready for the Lord a people prepared."
zh: 他必有以利亞的靈和能力，行在主的前面，叫父親的心轉向兒女，叫悖逆的轉向義人的意念，為主安排那預備好了的人民。”

en: And Zechariah said to the angel, "How shall I know this? For I am an old man, and my wife is advanced in years."
zh: 撒迦利亞對天使說：“我怎麼能知道這事呢？我已經老了，我妻子也上了年紀。”

en: And the angel answered him, "I am Gabriel, who stands in the presence of God, and I was sent to speak to you and to bring you this good news.
zh: 天使回答：“我是站在 神面前的加百列，奉差遣向你說話，報給你這好消息。

en: And behold, you will be silent and unable to speak until the day that these things take place, because you did not believe my words, which will be fulfilled in their time."
zh: 看吧！到了時候我的話必要應驗；因為你不信我的話，你必成為啞巴，直到這些事成就的那一天，才能說話。”

en: And the people were waiting for Zechariah, and they were wondering at his delay in the temple.
zh: 眾人等候撒迦利亞；因他在聖殿裡遲遲不出來，覺得奇怪。

en: And when he came out, he was unable to speak to them, and they realized that he had seen a vision in the temple. And he kept making signs to them and remained mute.
zh: 等到他出來，卻不能講話，竟成了啞巴，不斷地向他們打手式，他們就知道他在聖殿裡見了異象。

en: And when his time of service was ended, he went to his home.
zh: 供職的日子滿了，他就回家去。

en: After these days his wife Elizabeth conceived, and for five months she kept herself hidden, saying,
zh: 過了幾天，他妻子以利沙伯懷了孕，隱藏了五個月，說：

en: "Thus the Lord has done for me in the days when he looked on me, to take away my reproach among people."
zh: “主在眷顧的日子，這樣看待我，要把我在人間的羞恥除掉。”

en: In the sixth month the angel Gabriel was sent from God to a city of Galilee named Nazareth,
zh: 到了第六個月，天使加百列奉 神差遣，往加利利的拿撒勒城去，

en: to a virgin betrothed to a man whose name was Joseph, of the house of David. And the virgin's name was Mary.
zh: 到了一個童貞女那裡，她已經和大衛家一個名叫約瑟的人訂了婚，童貞女的名字是馬利亞。

en: And he came to her and said, "Greetings, O favored one, the Lord is with you!"
zh: 天使進去，對她說：“恭喜！蒙大恩的女子，主與你同在！”

en: But she was greatly troubled at the saying, and tried to discern what sort of greeting this might be.
zh: 她卻因這話驚慌起來，反覆思想這樣祝賀是甚麼意思。

en: And the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God.
zh: 天使說：“馬利亞，不要怕！因你已從 神那裡蒙了恩。

en: And behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall call his name Jesus.
zh: 你將懷孕生子，要給他起名叫耶穌。

en: He will be great and will be called the Son of the Most High. And the Lord God will give to him the throne of his father David,
zh: 他將要被尊為大，稱為至高者的兒子，主 神要把他祖大衛的王位賜給他，

en: and he will reign over the house of Jacob forever, and of his kingdom there will be no end."
zh: 他要作王統治雅各家，直到永遠，他的國沒有窮盡。”

en: And Mary said to the angel, "How will this be, since I am a virgin?"
zh: 馬利亞對天使說：“我還沒有出嫁 ，怎能有這事呢？”

en: And the angel answered her, "The Holy Spirit will come upon you, and the power of the Most High will overshadow you; therefore the child to be born will be called holy- the Son of God.
zh: 天使回答：“聖靈要臨到你，至高者的能力要覆庇你，因此那將要出生的聖者，必稱為 神的兒子。

en: And behold, your relative Elizabeth in her old age has also conceived a son, and this is the sixth month with her who was called barren.
zh: 你看，你親戚以利沙伯，被稱為不生育的，在老年也懷了男胎，現在已是第六個月了，

en: For nothing will be impossible with God."
zh: 因為在 神沒有一件事是不可能的。”

en: And Mary said, "Behold, I am the servant of the Lord; let it be to me according to your word." And the angel departed from her.
zh: 馬利亞說：“我是主的婢女，願照你的話成就在我身上！”天使就離開她去了。

en: In those days Mary arose and went with haste into the hill country, to a town in Judah,
zh: 後來，馬利亞就起身，急忙向山地去，來到猶大的一座城，

en: and she entered the house of Zechariah and greeted Elizabeth.
zh: 進了撒迦利亞的家，向以利沙伯問安。

en: And when Elizabeth heard the greeting of Mary, the baby leaped in her womb. And Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit,
zh: 以利沙伯一聽見馬利亞的問安，腹中的胎兒就跳動，以利沙伯也被聖靈充滿，

en: and she exclaimed with a loud cry, "Blessed are you among women, and blessed is the fruit of your womb!
zh: 就高聲說：“你在女子中是有福的！你腹中的胎兒也是有福的！

en: And why is this granted to me that the mother of my Lord should come to me?
zh: 我主的母親竟然到我這裡來。這事怎會臨到我呢？

en: For behold, when the sound of your greeting came to my ears, the baby in my womb leaped for joy.
zh: 你看，你問安的聲音一進我的耳朵，我腹中的胎兒就歡喜跳躍。

en: And blessed is she who believed that there would be a fulfillment of what was spoken to her from the Lord."
zh: 這相信主傳給她的話必要成就的女子是有福的。”

en: And Mary said, "My soul magnifies the Lord,
zh: 馬利亞說： “我心尊主為大，

en: and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior,
zh: 我靈以 神我的救主為樂，

en: for he has looked on the humble estate of his servant. For behold, from now on all generations will call me blessed;
zh: 因為他垂顧他婢女的卑微， 看哪！今後萬代都要稱我為有福。

en: for he who is mighty has done great things for me, and holy is his name.
zh: 全能者為我行了大事，他的名為聖；

en: And his mercy is for those who fear him from generation to generation.
zh: 他的憐憫世世代代歸與敬畏他的人。

en: He has shown strength with his arm; he has scattered the proud in the thoughts of their hearts;
zh: 他用膀臂施展大能， 驅散心裡妄想的狂傲人。

en: he has brought down the mighty from their thrones and exalted those of humble estate;
zh: 他使有權能的失位， 叫卑微的升高，

en: he has filled the hungry with good things, and the rich he has sent empty away.
zh: 讓飢餓的得飽美食， 使富足的空手回去。

en: He has helped his servant Israel, in remembrance of his mercy,
zh: 他扶助了他的僕人以色列， 為要記念他的憐憫，

en: as he spoke to our fathers, to Abraham and to his offspring forever."
zh: 正如他向我們列祖所說的， 恩待亞伯拉罕和他的後裔，直到永遠。”

en: And Mary remained with her about three months and returned to her home.
zh: 馬利亞和以利沙伯同住約有三個月，就回家去了。

en: Now the time came for Elizabeth to give birth, and she bore a son.
zh: 以利沙伯的產期到了，生了一個兒子。

en: And her neighbors and relatives heard that the Lord had shown great mercy to her, and they rejoiced with her.
zh: 鄰里親戚，聽見主向她大施憐憫，都和她一同歡樂。

en: And on the eighth day they came to circumcise the child. And they would have called him Zechariah after his father,
zh: 到了第八天，他們來給孩子行割禮，要照他父親的名字，叫他撒迦利亞。

en: but his mother answered, "No; he shall be called John."
zh: 但他母親說：“不可，要叫他約翰。”

en: And they said to her, "None of your relatives is called by this name."
zh: 他們說：“你親族裡沒有叫這名字的。”

en: And they made signs to his father, inquiring what he wanted him to be called.
zh: 他們就向孩子的父親打手式，看他要叫他甚麼。

en: And he asked for a writing tablet and wrote, "His name is John." And they all wondered.
zh: 他要了一塊寫字版，寫上說：“他的名字是約翰。”眾人都希奇。

en: And immediately his mouth was opened and his tongue loosed, and he spoke, blessing God.
zh: 撒迦利亞的口舌立刻開了，就出聲稱頌 神。

en: And fear came on all their neighbors. And all these things were talked about through all the hill country of Judea,
zh: 住在周圍的人都害怕，這一切事傳遍了整個猶太山地，

en: and all who heard them laid them up in their hearts, saying, "What then will this child be?" For the hand of the Lord was with him.
zh: 凡聽見的就把這些事放在心裡，說：“這孩子將會成為怎樣的人呢？因為主的手與他同在。”

en: And his father Zechariah was filled with the Holy Spirit and prophesied, saying,
zh: 他的父親撒迦利亞被聖靈充滿，預言說：

en: "Blessed be the Lord God of Israel, for he has visited and redeemed his people
zh: “主，以色列的 神，是應當稱頌的， 因他眷顧自己的子民，施行救贖，

en: and has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David,
zh: 在他僕人大衛家中， 為我們興起救恩的角，

en: as he spoke by the mouth of his holy prophets from of old,
zh: 正如主自古以來藉聖先知口中所說的，

en: that we should be saved from our enemies and from the hand of all who hate us;
zh: 救我們脫離仇敵，和恨我們的人的手；

en: to show the mercy promised to our fathers and to remember his holy covenant,
zh: 向我們列祖施憐憫，記念他的聖約，

en: the oath that he swore to our father Abraham, to grant us
zh: 就是他對我們祖先亞伯拉罕所起的誓，

en: that we, being delivered from the hand of our enemies, might serve him without fear,
zh: 把我們從仇敵手中救拔出來， 叫我們可以坦然無懼，用聖潔公義， 在他面前一生一世敬拜他。

en: in holiness and righteousness before him all our days.
zh: 孩子啊，你要稱為至高者的先知， 因為你要行在主的面前，預備他的路，

en: And you, child, will be called the prophet of the Most High; for you will go before the Lord to prepare his ways,
zh: 使他的子民，因罪得赦，就知道救恩。

en: to give knowledge of salvation to his people in the forgiveness of their sins,
zh: 因我們 神的憐憫， 使清晨的陽光從高天臨到我們，

en: because of the tender mercy of our God, whereby the sunrise shall visit us from on high
zh: 光照那坐在黑暗中死蔭裡的人， 引導我們的腳，走上平安的路。”

en: to give light to those who sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace."
zh: 這孩子漸漸長大，心靈健壯，住在曠野，直到他在以色列人中公開露面的日子。

en: And the child grew and became strong in spirit, and he was in the wilderness until the day of his public appearance to Israel.
